allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/Users/valeriy/transformation/data.json'\)\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('all_tasks count:', len\(d.get\('all_tasks', []\)\)\); print\('sample task:', json.dumps\(d['all_tasks'][0], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\) if d.get\('all_tasks'\) else 'none'\); print\('sample project keys:', list\(d['projects'][0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\('projects'\) else 'none'\)")
